name: Breast MRI
description: Dedicated breast MRI for evaluation of breast pathology with contrast enhancement

findings.technique: Dedicated breast MRI was performed with T1, T2, and contrast-enhanced sequences in axial and sagittal planes.
findings.comparison: No prior studies available for comparison.

sections.name: Right Breast
sections.content: The right breast demonstrates [no mass / no abnormal enhancement / no focal abnormality]. The fibroglandular tissue is [normal / appropriate for density].

sections.name: Left Breast
sections.content: The left breast demonstrates [no mass / no abnormal enhancement / no focal abnormality]. The fibroglandular tissue is [normal / appropriate for density].

sections.name: Enhancement Pattern
sections.content: There is [no non-mass like enhancement / no ductal enhancement / no regional enhancement] identified.

sections.name: Axillae
sections.content: The bilateral axillae demonstrate [no pathologically enlarged lymph nodes / no abnormal lymph nodes]. No axillary mass.

sections.name: Implants
sections.content: If present, the breast implants are [intact / no rupture / no intracapsular rupture / no extracapsular rupture].

sections.name: Kinetic Analysis
sections.content: The enhancement kinetics demonstrate [no rapid wash-in / no suspicious curve type]. All findings show [benign / background] enhancement pattern.

impression: BI-RADS Category 1: Negative. No suspicious finding on breast MRI.
author: RadReport Templates
